question: What does E&P Systems actually do, and who is it for?
answer:
E&P Systems is an AI-first development agency based in Sofia, Bulgaria. We build AI-powered websites, automation pipelines, agents, and e-commerce solutions — primarily for Bulgarian SMBs.

Practically, this means: if you're a business that needs a website with real AI built into it, an automation that eliminates manual work, or an agent that handles a repetitive process — we build that, end-to-end, fast.

We're not a traditional dev shop. We use AI tools (Claude API, n8n, Cursor, Lovable) as core parts of our workflow, which means we move at 2–3x the pace of a conventional team and our clients pay for results, not hours.
query: What E&P Systems does and who it serves

question: What's your technical background and how does it relate to your AI work?
answer:
I started out as an embedded software engineer — five years across Visteon Electronics and MBition (Mercedes-Benz), writing C/C++ for RTOS-based automotive systems, AUTOSAR compliance, ECUs. Safety-critical stuff where bugs have real consequences.

That background shapes everything I build now. I think in systems, edge cases, and production reliability. When I'm building an AI product, I'm not just prompting — I'm thinking about architecture, failure modes, and what happens at scale.

Since 2025 I've been co-running E&P Systems alongside my senior engineering role at MBition, building full-stack AI products with React/Next.js, Supabase, Claude API, and n8n.
query: Emil's technical background and how embedded experience relates to AI work

question: What AI tools and stack do you work with day-to-day?
answer:
My daily stack:

**AI & Automation:** Claude API (Anthropic), n8n (self-hosted on Hetzner), OpenAI API, RAG, embeddings, prompt engineering
**AI-Assisted Dev:** Cursor, Lovable, Trae, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot
**Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS
**Backend:** Node.js, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Edge Functions, REST APIs
**Infra:** Vercel, Hetzner VPS (CPX22, Ubuntu 24.04), Docker, Caddy
**Embedded (day job):** C/C++, RTOS, AUTOSAR, Mercedes-Benz toolchains

MCP servers I use regularly: Notion, Google Calendar, Gmail, Canva, Figma, Filesystem, Supabase, Context7, Vercel, Vibe Prospecting.
query: Emil's AI tools and tech stack

question: Can you build something for my business?
answer:
Depends on what you need. E&P Systems works best with:

- Businesses that need a website with actual AI functionality (not just a chatbot widget slapped on)
- E-commerce operations that want automation — supplier data pipelines, SEO auditing, CRM workflows
- Companies that have a manual, repetitive process and want an agent or automation to handle it

We're not the right fit for large enterprise projects with long procurement cycles, or businesses that just want a basic brochure site with no AI component.

Best way to start: email me at [emildermendjiev9@gmail.com](mailto:emildermendjiev9@gmail.com) with a one-paragraph description of what you're trying to build. I'll tell you quickly if it's something we can help with.
query: Whether Emil can build a project for a business

question: What projects have you shipped?
answer:
A few of the notable ones:

**InsurancePro** — Policy reminders SaaS with automatic SMS notifications. Full-stack, AI-assisted build. [client-renewguard.vercel.app](https://client-renewguard.vercel.app)

**Bosconsult** — Law firm website with dynamic forms and automated email workflows. [bosconsults.org](https://bosconsults.org)

**AI SEO Audit Tool** — Micro-SaaS that runs automated SEO audits via Claude API and generates actionable reports. Used this internally and delivered it as a service for clients — the Ozonic.bg audit is the flagship case study.

**E&P Systems Affiliate System** — Full affiliate portal and landing page with Supabase backend.

**AIOS (AI Personal OS)** — In progress. Claude API + n8n + Supabase + Telegram, unified into a personal planning and automation system.
query: Projects Emil has built and shipped

question: What is your n8n setup and can you help me with automation?
answer:
I run a self-hosted n8n instance at automate.epsystems.org on a Hetzner CPX22 VPS (Ubuntu 24.04, Docker, Caddy reverse proxy, PostgreSQL 16). It's been solid.

For client work, I build automation pipelines using n8n + Claude API + Supabase — things like content generation, SEO auditing workflows, CRM automations, and data pipelines.

If you have a specific automation problem, feel free to reach out. I can usually tell quickly whether it's straightforward or complex, and give you a rough sense of what it would take to build.
query: Emil's n8n setup and automation capabilities

question: Are you available for freelance or consulting work?
answer:
Yes, through E&P Systems. I'm not a solo freelancer taking random projects — E&P Systems is a proper agency with a co-founder (Pavel Stefanov) and a defined scope of work.

What we take on: AI-first web development, automation pipelines, AI agent builds, SEO auditing, e-commerce development.

What we don't do: generic IT support, non-AI brochure sites, or anything where the client just wants the cheapest option.

Best starting point: [epsystems.org](https://epsystems.org) or email [emildermendjiev9@gmail.com](mailto:emildermendjiev9@gmail.com).
query: Whether Emil is available for freelance or consulting
